title: 3 Dividend Growth Stocks for Long-Term Returns
text: Dividend growth investors consider multiple things when buying a stock, such as dividend yields and price-to-earnings (P/E) ratios. These investors should also incorporate a company's future growth potential into their analysis.

title: Robust Comps Growth Aid Yum! Brands (YUM), High Costs Ail
text: Yum! Brands (YUM) benefits from strong same-store sales growth, successful expansion initiatives and a thriving digital transformation.

title: 4 Undervalued Stocks With Stunning ROIC
text: Investors looking to identify high-quality companies should consider those names that have consistently shown to generate a strong return on invested capital. This shows that these companies are successfully using capital to generate profits.

title: A fight between fast food chains and unions in California is over, for now – what to know
text: The California minimum wage for fast-food workers is on track to rise to $20 an hour next April.

title: 3 Best Stocks to Buy for Investors Building a ‘Brands' Portfolio: 2023 Edition
text: Almost two years ago, I wrote about seven stocks to buy whose products and services were in high demand.  What made the story unique is that each company recommended had the word “Brands” as part of their corporate name.
